# The Wise Monkey

> The Wise Monkey is a deep tech software development studio building production-ready platforms across AI, blockchain, distributed systems, and embedded software. Founded by Agu Rodriguez. Based in the United Kingdom.

We design resilient systems that move products from prototype to production with measurable business outcomes. Every engagement is delivery-focused — strategy, architecture, and shipping milestones tailored to the client's business.

## Site

- [Homepage](https://www.thewisemonkey.co.uk/): Studio overview, services, and contact.
- [Privacy Policy](https://www.thewisemonkey.co.uk/privacy-policy): How we handle visitor data.
- [Sitemap](https://www.thewisemonkey.co.uk/sitemap.xml): Indexable URLs.

## Services

- **Intelligent Products**: Applied AI/ML systems — copilots, decision engines, recommendation and ranking systems, workflow orchestration, evaluation and safety.
- **Blockchain & Smart Contracts**: Smart contracts and audits, DeFi and tokenization, wallets and payments, security and compliance.
- **Distributed Systems**: Microservices, event-driven architectures, scalable data pipelines, observability and SRE, high-availability designs.
- **Embedded & Edge**: Firmware and RTOS, edge AI and analytics, device-to-cloud integration, testing and validation.

## Blog

- [Blog homepage](https://blog.thewisemonkey.co.uk/): Practical notes on building AI, blockchain, distributed, and embedded products that reach production.
- [Blog sitemap](https://blog.thewisemonkey.co.uk/sitemap.xml): All published posts.

## Contact

- Email: hello@thewisemonkey.co.uk
- Strategy call: book through the contact section on the homepage.

## Machine-readable resources

- [llms-full.txt](https://www.thewisemonkey.co.uk/llms-full.txt): Full site content concatenated as markdown.
- [API catalog](https://www.thewisemonkey.co.uk/.well-known/api-catalog): RFC 9727 linkset for available APIs.
- [Agent skills index](https://www.thewisemonkey.co.uk/.well-known/agent-skills/index.json): Skills agents can load to interact with our content.
